name: video-gen-pro-2026
description: Professional AI-powered video generation with engaging content

scripts.generate:ar: cross-env LANGUAGE=ar CONTENT_TYPE=Motivational MAIN_TOPIC='النجاح والإصرار' node scripts/generate-video.mjs
scripts.generate:en: cross-env LANGUAGE=en CONTENT_TYPE=Motivational MAIN_TOPIC='Success and Determination' node scripts/generate-video.mjs
scripts.generate:fr: cross-env LANGUAGE=fr CONTENT_TYPE=Motivational MAIN_TOPIC='Succès et Détermination' node scripts/generate-video.mjs
